development.prebuildCommand: node scripts/patch-folly.js ; node -e "require('fs').rmSync('ios', {recursive:true,force:true})" && npx expo prebuild && node scripts/patch-folly.js

preview.prebuildCommand: node scripts/patch-folly.js ; node -e "require('fs').rmSync('ios', {recursive:true,force:true})" && npx expo prebuild && node scripts/patch-folly.js

production.prebuildCommand: node scripts/patch-folly.js ; node -e "require('fs').rmSync('ios', {recursive:true,force:true})" && npx expo prebuild && node scripts/patch-folly.js
